message:
feat(config): support explicit --config-file CLI override

Add highest-priority config file override via CONFIG_FILE_OVERRIDE,
allowing users to specify an exact config path that takes precedence
over all automatic discovery:

- detection.rs: Add CONFIG_FILE_OVERRIDE OnceLock and
  set_config_file_override() / config_file_override() accessors;
  integrate into config file search order as priority 1
- toml_config.rs: Update search order to check explicit override first
  (1. --config-file, 2. $FRANKENTERM_CONFIG_FILE env, 3. XDG path,
  4. ~/.frankenterm.toml); add is_toml_path() helper and
  load_required_toml_path() for non-optional loading
- wasm_config.rs: Mirror the same override priority for WASM config
  loading path with explicit_config_file_override_path() check

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
